hero.description: Technical and vocational courses focused on the industrial market. Hands-on classes, recognized certification, and high employability.

courses.professionalSubtitle: Fast-track training for the job market
courses.technicalSubtitle: Complete technical education with recognized certification

prof.nr10Desc: Safety in electrical installations and services. Mandatory course for electrical professionals.
prof.nr10CompDesc: Supplementary training for work on the Electrical Power System (SEP).
prof.nr35Desc: Working at heights safely. Required training per regulatory standards.
prof.frentistaDesc: Complete training for attendants with safety training for flammables and fuels.
prof.refrigeracaoDesc: Installation and maintenance of refrigeration and air conditioning systems.

elec.basicaDesc: Electrical fundamentals and residential and commercial building installations.
elec.industrialDesc: Industrial electrical commands and Programmable Logic Controller programming.
elec.altaBaixaDesc: Installation and maintenance of high and low voltage systems.

tech.eletromecDesc: Complete training in industrial electrical and mechanical systems. Maintenance and automation.
tech.eletrotecDesc: Design, installation, and maintenance of power and control electrical systems.
tech.automacaoDesc: Automated systems, robotics, PLC, and industrial instrumentation.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first contact to your professional career in a few steps

steps.enrollmentDesc: Simple and fast process. In-person or via contact.
steps.classesDesc: Updated content with practice in equipped laboratories.
steps.certificationDesc: Certificate recognized by MEC and the job market.
steps.careerDesc: Complete preparation to land your position in the industry.

career.title: Job Market
career.subtitle: High-demand fields with excellent salaries await you

items.electricianDesc: High demand in factories, industries, and large companies.
items.maintenanceDesc: Preventive and corrective maintenance of industrial equipment.
items.automationDesc: PLC programming, robotics, and automated systems.
items.energyDesc: Solar, wind, and electrical power systems.

items.a1: Professional courses range from 40 to 240 hours. Technical courses last 2 years with theory and hands-on classes.
items.q2: Do the courses include a certificate?
items.a2: Yes! All courses include a recognized certificate. Technical courses are registered with MEC.
items.a3: Yes! Our courses combine theory and practice in modern, well-equipped laboratories, ensuring real-world learning.
items.a4: The minimum age for professional courses is 18 years. For technical courses, you must have completed or be attending high school.
items.a5: You can enroll in person at our headquarters or contact us to start the enrollment process quickly and easily.

cta.title: Invest in your professional future
cta.subtitle: Secure your spot and start your journey to a successful career in industry.

footer.description: Training professionals for the industry with quality technical and vocational courses.
footer.followUs: Follow us for news and project updates.
